title: Drip vs Loops (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Drip vs Loops: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Drip and Loops comes down to your specific use case. Drip is built for e-commerce businesses wanting deep store integration, while Loops targets SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

comparison_table.tool_a: E-Commerce Businesses Wanting Deep Store Integration
comparison_table.tool_b: Saas Companies Sending Product And Lifecycle Emails

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on e-commerce businesses wanting deep store integration
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Drip wins for e-commerce businesses wanting deep store integration, while Loops is stronger for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Drip or Loops?
faq.a: Drip starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Loops to Drip?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
